stemHtml: Which of the following can happen if both the low pressure booster pumps in a fuel tank fail?

options.a: Altitude limitations may apply when flying with inoperative booster pumps.
options.b: Fuel starvation is due to a lack of pressure for fuel transfer.
options.c: Restriction of airspeed due to limited fuel flow.
options.d: Cavitation will be likely to occur at low altitudes.
